_comment: Minimal RxNorm combination-product → ingredient table. Used by parseRxNormProduct() in src/mcp-server/tools/cascade-interactions.ts to decompose combo products into their constituent ingredients so each ingredient can be matched to the CYP450 KB independently. Names are matched case-insensitively as substrings of the medication display string. RxNorm CUIs are SCD/SBD codes from RxNav as of May 2026.
_match_rules: When a medication display string contains any of the keys (case-insensitive), it expands to the listed ingredients. Slash-separated brand/generic forms (e.g. 'Nirmatrelvir/Ritonavir') are matched on either side. Combo products NOT in this table fall through to the legacy single-ingredient parser.
